examples: Prices are high and our kids gotta eat.
When someone tells you that you have to give a speech, your response may be "I gotta do what?"
In other words, you gotta stretch yourself, get uncomfortable and get out of your comfort zone, and then keep getting out.
You gotta give it to him, he gave the audience one heck of a performance.
You gotta wait for operators under pressure to come to you hat in hand.
